Where Every ChildLoves to Learn

A nurturing, joyful environment where curiosity is celebrated, creativity blooms, and every student discovers their unique brilliance.

Scholarship Initiative

Empowering Tribal & Underprivileged Children Through Education

SANDIPANI VIDYALAYA proudly supports deserving students through the SUSHAMAJAY Scholarship Programme, helping children from tribal and underserved communities access quality education, confidence, and a brighter future.

Rooted in the spirit of Jharkhand — our motherland — we believe every child deserves an opportunity to learn, grow, and dream without limitations.

“Education with Dignity, Opportunity for Every Child.”
Shri Chandra Bhushan Sharma
Mentor
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
💬 Message from the Mentor

A Warm Welcome to SANDIPANI VIDYALAYA

Dear Parents, Students, and Friends of SANDIPANI VIDYALAYA — welcome to our little corner of the world where every child matters. We believe that education is not just about academics, but about nurturing curiosity, kindness, and the confidence to dream big. Our dedicated teachers and staff work tirelessly every single day to create a safe, joyful, and inspiring environment where children don't just learn — they truly flourish. Whether you are a new family joining us or a returning one, we are honored to be part of your child's journey. Together, let's make this year extraordinary.
Shri Chandra Bhushan Sharma — Vice Chancellor, Vinoba Bhave University, Hazaribag, Jharkhand View Profile →
👨‍💼
Shri Sanjay Kumar
Director
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
💬 Message from the Director

Building Tomorrow's Leaders Today

Dear Parents, Students, and Friends of SANDIPANI VIDYALAYA — Welcome to SANDIPANI VIDYALAYA — a place where learning begins with curiosity and grows with confidence. We are committed to creating a nurturing environment where every child feels valued, inspired, and encouraged to reach their fullest potential. Our school is more than just classrooms and books; it is a community built on respect, creativity, and lifelong learning. With the support of dedicated teachers, caring parents, and enthusiastic students, we strive to shape not only bright minds but also responsible and compassionate individuals. We are delighted to have you as part of our school family and look forward to achieving wonderful milestones together.
Shri Sanjay Kumar — Director, Sandipani Vidyalaya View Profile →
Nilesh K Singh
Academic Advisor
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
💬 Message from the Academic Advisor

Guiding Every Step of the Academic Journey

Dear Parents, Students, and Friends of SANDIPANI VIDYALAYA — Academic excellence is built on a foundation of curiosity, discipline, and inspired guidance. As your Academic Advisor, I am committed to ensuring that every student receives the support, mentorship, and direction needed to unlock their full potential. Education is a journey, and together, we will navigate its challenges and celebrate its milestones. Let us build a brighter future, one student at a time.
Nilesh K Singh — Academic Advisor, Sandipani Vidyalaya View Profile →

📰 Press Coverage
School in the News
Sandipani Vidyalaya making headlines — stories that inspire our community.
📰 Rastriya Sagar
सांदीपनि विद्यालय में कंप्यूटर कक्ष एवं दस कंप्यूटरों का किया गया उद्घाटन
Inauguration of the Computer Lab & 10 computers at Sandipani Vidyalaya, connecting students with technology education.
📰 Pratah: Aawaj
पिस्का नगड़ी में स्थापना दिवस का उल्लासपूर्ण आयोजन
Founding Day celebrated with great enthusiasm — free books, clothes & shoes distributed to students by the school.
📰 Pratah: Aawaj
कंप्यूटर कक्ष के उद्घाटन के अवसर पर भव्य समारोह का आयोजन
Grand ceremony held for the inauguration of the Computer Lab, gifted by Shanti Upendra Foundation for Development Initiative Trust.

Mentor • Vinoba Bhave University

Prof. (Dr.) Chandra Bhushan Sharma

Vice Chancellor, Vinoba Bhave University, Hazaribag, Jharkhand

🎓 Linguist & Educator 🏛️ 40+ Years Experience 🌏 Commonwealth Scholar
🏅
President's Award
"Digital Initiatives" — Vigyan Bhawan, 2017
🌐
CoL Award of Excellence
Distance Education — Commonwealth of Learning
🌹
Paul Harris Fellow
Rotary Foundation of Rotary International

About

Prof. Chandra Bhushan Sharma is presently the Vice Chancellor of Vinoba Bhave University, Hazaribag, Jharkhand. He is a Linguist by training and specializes in language education, with nearly four decades of teaching experience.

He obtained his M.Phil. from JNU and PhD from the University of Hull, Britain on a Commonwealth Scholarship. His book Shiksha Samaj Aur Rajniti highlights critical issues in Indian education including language, student politics, and institutional reform.

Key Roles Held

🏫
Chairman, NIOS
National Institute of Open Schooling, Govt. of India (April 2015 – April 2020)
📚
Director, School of Education
Indira Gandhi National Open University (IGNOU)
🔍
Chief Vigilance Officer
IGNOU — maintained institutional integrity
🌍
Director, DEP-SSA
Distance Education Programme, Sarva Shiksha Abhiyaan, MHRD
🎓
Vice Chancellor, VBU
Vinoba Bhave University, Hazaribag, Jharkhand
🌐
International Facilitator
UBEC Nigeria Open School, July 2018

Landmark Achievements

✅

Trained 12 lakh+ untrained in-service teachers through the D.El.Ed. programme at NIOS — completed in a record time of 18 months on assignment from the Government of India.

✅

Introduced Bhartiya Gyan Parampara courses (Sanskrit medium) at NIOS leading to Secondary & Senior Secondary Certificates in Indian Knowledge Tradition.

✅

Led NIOS to win the Commonwealth of Learning Award of Excellence for Institutional Achievement in Distance Education (November 2016) and another CoL Award for deaf learners (2019).

✅

Member of Indian delegation to the Commonwealth Ministerial Meet at Bahamas (May 2015) led by the Hon'ble HRD Minister of India.

✅

Served on national policy-framing committees including reviews of NCTE, Distance Education Council of India Bill, and the Right to Education Act.

Vinoba Bhave University, Hazaribag, Jharkhand
Official University Administrative Profile
Visit Official Profile
